attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WSOV.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 		
WSOV.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT, 		
WSOV.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 		
WSOV.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 		
WSOV.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT, 		
WSOV.SS_CD, 		
WSOV.START_SSP_DATE, 		
WSOV.START_TV_DTM, 		
WSOV.END_SSP_DATE, 		
WSOV.END_TV_DTM, 		
WSOV.AUTO_BOOK_FLAG, 		
WSOV.SO_SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT, 		
WSOV.ORDER_PROMOTION_CD, 		
WSOV.ORDER_DISCOUNT_PERCENT, 		
WSOV.SO_ALIGN_MERGE_CD, 		
WSOV.SO_PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT, 		
WSOV.BILL_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY , 		
WSOV.SHIP_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY , 		
WSOV.SALES_ORDER_CS_FAX_IMAGE_ID, 		
WSOV.SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT, 		
WSOV.SOLD_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY , 		
WSOV.SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM, 		
WSOV.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 		
WSOV.EDW_CREATE_USER, 		
WSOV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 		
WSOV.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 		
WSOV.DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG, 		
WSOV.BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD, 		
WSOV.COMPLETE_ORDER_DTM, 		
WSOV.SO_TAA_FLG, 		
WSOV.SO_DPAS_RATING_CD,		
WSOV.REFERENCE_SALES_ORDER_KEY,  /* Release8.0 */		
WSOV.SO_TAX_EXEMPTED_FLG,   /* Release8.0 */		
WSOV.SO_GSA_FLG,  /* Release8.0 */		
WSOV.SO_DWP_ELIGIBLE_FLG,   /* Release8.0 */		
WSOV.SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVCS_PROJECT_ID,   /* Release8.0 */		
WSOV.SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVS_PROJ_DESCR,  /* Release8.0 */		
WSOV.BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME,   /* Release8.0 */		
WSOV.SRC_RPTD_SO_FINANCIAL_DEPT_ID,   /* Release8.0 */		
WSOV.SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD,   /* Release8.0 */		
WSOV.SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD,   /* Release8.0 */		
WSOV.PARTNER_CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY,   /* Release8.0 AM  Changes*/   		
WSOV.RU_SO_CANCELLED_DTM,    /* Release8.0 AM  Changes*/   		
WSOV.SO_CLOSED_DTM,  /* Release8.0 AM  Changes*/ 		
WSOV.CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD ,   /* Release8.0 AM  Changes*/      		
WSOV.DROP_SHIP_FLG,     /* Release8.0 AM  Changes*/        		
WSOV.INVOICE_STRATEGY_CD ,     /* Release8.0 AM  Changes*/  		
WSOV.BILL_TO_EMAIL_ADDR,   /* ICW */		
WSOV.SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD,   /* ICW */		
WSOV.US_FEDERAL_GOVT_ORDER_FLG, /* ICW */		
WSOV.ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT, /*REPAIR CHANGES */		
WSOV.ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,  /*REPAIR CHANGES */		
WSOV.ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT ,  /*REPAIR CHANGES */		
WSOV.REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE, /*REPAIR CHANGES */		
WSOV.RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT,  /*REPAIR CHANGES */		
WSOV.RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM,  /*REPAIR CHANGES */		
WSOV.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,		
WSOV.CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD, /* Release 14 ccw */	
WSOV.SOURCE_REPORTED_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID, /* Q1F12 CCW change */
WSOV.FOUNDATION_ORDER_CD , /* Q1F12 ICPM change */
WSOV.COUNTRY_ENABLEMENT_COUNTRY_CD,  /* Q2F12 CE INDIA Change */
WSOV.SO_IN_CG1_FLG,
WSOV.SO_IN_SJ_FLG,
WSOV.CBN_FLG/* Added as part of Sales_orders changes for August QW032,2014*/,
WSOV.REPLACEMENT_REASON_CD,  /* ADDED AS PART OF CSSO CHANGES Q2FY15*/
WSOV.RETURN_REASON_CD
FROM $$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER_V1 WSOV
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT
WHERE NSOVT. SALES_ORDER_KEY = WSOV.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
attributes.Pre SQL:
UPDATE NSOVT FROM 
$$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER_V1 WSOV,
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT
SET END_TV_DTM=WSOV.END_TV_DTM,  
SO_SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT=WSOV.SO_SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT,
SO_PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT =WSOV.SO_PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT ,
BILL_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY=WSOV.BILL_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,
SHIP_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY=WSOV.SHIP_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT=WSOV.SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT, 
SOLD_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY=WSOV.SOLD_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM=WSOV.SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM , 
SO_TAA_FLG  = WSOV.SO_TAA_FLG ,  
SO_DPAS_RATING_CD  = WSOV.SO_DPAS_RATING_CD  ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER = USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG=WSOV.DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG, 
BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD=WSOV.BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD ,
REFERENCE_SALES_ORDER_KEY =WSOV.REFERENCE_SALES_ORDER_KEY, /*Realese 8.0*/
SO_DWP_ELIGIBLE_FLG =WSOV.SO_DWP_ELIGIBLE_FLG, /*Realese 8.0*/
BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME =WSOV.BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME, /*Realesel 8.0*/
PARTNER_CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY= WSOV.PARTNER_CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY, /* Rel8.0 AM changes */
RU_SO_CANCELLED_DTM = WSOV.RU_SO_CANCELLED_DTM , /* Rel8.0 AM changes */
SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD = WSOV.SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD,     /* ICW */
ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT = WSOV.ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT, /* REPAIR CHANGES */
ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT = WSOV.ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT, /* REPAIR CHANGES */
ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT = WSOV.ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT, /* REPAIR CHANGES */
RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM = WSOV.RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM, /* REPAIR CHANGES */
REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE = WSOV.REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE, /* REPAIR CHANGES */
RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT= WSOV.RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT, /* REPAIR CHANGES */
DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT=WSOV.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT
WHERE NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = WSOV.SALES_ORDER_KEY;
